problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
